text:
In a sleepy little town called Maple Shade, there lived a boy named Tom who loved collecting marbles. His bedroom walls were adorned with glittering glass stones of every color. Every Saturday morning he'd scour yard sales and antique stores. One foggy Wednesday, Tom found something special—a rare collection of striped marbles. They were rainbow hues of burgundy and pearl.

That night, Tom showed his treasure tophies! His friends loved them. They played marbling games at the park. But then summer ended.

Christmas came, and Tom wanted something special. He wrote letters to grandparents. They sent funny old pictures.

One year, Santa brought marbles. Lots of them! Tom loved them so much.

Now seasons change, and winters loom. Tom climbed mountains. Those stripes warmed his soul.

Every snowfall twilight, he'd search again. Finally, one day an old lady handed him an old box.

Inside? Snowflake marbles!

Tom danced with joy!

Fell asleep dreaming
